'''Bantha Squad''' was a [[Training squadron|training]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[TIE pilot|pilot]] [[Cadet/Legends|cadets]] at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. During a training mission in [[Tarkin's Teeth]], [[Cadet/Legends|Cadet]] [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] killed half a dozen members of Bantha Squad in her [[Mountain Terrain Scout Transport]]; however, the survivors did not seem the least bit fazed.

{{Imp-stub}}
